ksa_text: Ability to assess, manage, and monitor compliance-related risks throughout the AI system lifecycle, including risk identification, mitigation, and governance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to AI Deployer Compliance Lead scope — regulatory/compliance signals detected ("compl  :y|ies|ying|iant|iance|iances"). Composite minimal (0.0000). Domain RC (affinity 0.90) aligns with REG competency profile. Seniority appropriate: describes regulatory interpretation, compliance program execution, or governance oversight.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 3 job-posting-level and 2 framework/certification matches (EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, CIPP/E, CRISC). Competency appears regularly in AI compliance and regulatory affairs role descriptions.
